rules.name: record_found_School_name_Phone_Account
rules.label: record found School name, Phone - Account

rules.name: record_found_School_name_Phone_Account_BW
rules.label: record found School name, Phone - Account

rules.name: record_found_School_name_Phone_Email
rules.label: record found School name, Phone, Email

rules.name: record_found_School_name_Phone_Email_BW
rules.label: record found School name, Phone, Email

Flow.description: Contact to Organization matching on various data points

formulas.name: SUBSTITUTE_phone_account
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Account_from_Contact.Phone})), IF( LEN( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Account_from_Contact.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") ) = 11, MID( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Account_from_Contact.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") , 2, 10 ), TRIM( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Account_from_Contact.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") ) ), '1' )

formulas.name: SUBSTITUTE_phone_contact
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Incoming_Contact.Phone})), IF( LEN( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Incoming_Contact.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") ) = 11, MID( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Incoming_Contact.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") , 2, 10 ), TRIM( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Incoming_Contact.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") ) ), '1' )

formulas.name: SUBSTITUTE_school_name_account
formulas.expression: SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!Account_from_Contact.Name} ,"'","") ,"’","") ,"‘","") ,"/","") ,".","") ,"-","") ,",","") ,"#","") ,"&","") ,")","") ,"(","") ,")","") ,"!","") ,"[","") ,"]","") ,"\"","") ,"“","") ,"”","") ,"=","")

formulas.name: SUBSTITUTE_school_name_contact
formulas.expression: SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!Incoming_Contact.Account.Name} ,"'","") ,"’","") ,"‘","") ,"/","") ,".","") ,"-","") ,",","") ,"#","") ,"&","") ,")","") ,"(","") ,")","") ,"!","") ,"[","") ,"]","") ,"\"","") ,"“","") ,"”","") ,"=","")

Flow.label: Contact to Organization matching

recordUpdates.label: Connect contacts account to BW Org record
